excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Architecture lists 1st round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st Round: 31 January 2026 2nd Round: 31 March 2026 Early applications are strongly encouraged. Please be reminded to ALSO complete the application materials submission via the School of Architecture online platform. Details can be found in the website link below: https://www.arch.cuhk.edu.hk/programmes/degrees/march
